queries.question: Show passengers who have requested either a luggage trolleys or the porter service, either being from Exit A.
queries.sql:
SELECT Passengers.Name 
FROM LuggageRequests JOIN Bookings ON LuggageRequests.RequestID = Bookings.LuggageRequestID JOIN Locations ON Bookings.LocationID = Locations.LocationID JOIN Passengers ON Passengers.PassengerID = LuggageRequests.PassengerID
WHERE (LuggageRequests.AssistanceType = 'Luggage Trolley' OR LuggageRequests.AssistanceType = 'Porter Service') AND Locations.LocationName = 'Exit A'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?luggagerequests a :LuggageRequests .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasLuggageRequests ?luggagerequests .
  ?locations a :Locations .
  ?bookings p:hasLocations ?locations .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?luggagerequests p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?name .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w2 .
  ?locations p:LocationName ?locationname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?assistancetype_w) = "Luggage Trolley" || STR(?assistancetype_w2) = "Porter Service")) && STR(?locationname_w) = "Exit A"))
}

queries.question: Which passengers request luggage trolleys and porter services from Exit A?
queries.sql:
SELECT Passengers.Name 
FROM LuggageRequests JOIN Bookings ON LuggageRequests.RequestID = Bookings.LuggageRequestID JOIN Locations ON Bookings.LocationID = Locations.LocationID JOIN Passengers ON Passengers.PassengerID = LuggageRequests.PassengerID
WHERE LuggageRequests.AssistanceType = 'Luggage Trolley' OR LuggageRequests.AssistanceType = 'Porter Service' AND Locations.LocationName = 'Exit A'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?luggagerequests a :LuggageRequests .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasLuggageRequests ?luggagerequests .
  ?locations a :Locations .
  ?bookings p:hasLocations ?locations .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?luggagerequests p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?name .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w2 .
  ?locations p:LocationName ?locationname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?assistancetype_w) = "Luggage Trolley" || (STR(?assistancetype_w2) = "Porter Service" && STR(?locationname_w) = "Exit A")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which passengers request luggage trolleys and porter services from Exit A?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?luggagerequests a :LuggageRequests .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasLuggageRequests ?luggagerequests .
  ?locations a :Locations .
  ?bookings p:hasLocations ?locations .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?luggagerequests p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?name .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w2 .
  ?locations p:LocationName ?locationname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?assistancetype_w) = "Luggage Trolley" || STR(?assistancetype_w2) = "Porter Service")) && STR(?locationname_w) = "Exit A"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?luggagerequests a :LuggageRequests .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasLuggageRequests ?luggagerequests .
  ?locations a :Locations .
  ?bookings p:hasLocations ?locations .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?luggagerequests p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?name .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w .
  ?luggagerequests p:AssistanceType ?assistancetype_w2 .
  ?locations p:LocationName ?locationname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?assistancetype_w) = "Luggage Trolley" || (STR(?assistancetype_w2) = "Porter Service" && STR(?locationname_w) = "Exit A")))
} }
}
